texto: But not everyone you love is a forever. Sometimes you can love someone for a reason, and for a time, and although you never stop loving them, no matter how much they may betray you, you move on, because they aren't the one who makes you into an us.
explicacao: Citação de Lauren Sabel sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “But not everyone you love is a forever. Sometimes you can love someone for a reason, and for a ti…” articula amor, betrayal, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como love.
